# BI-260007: Execute section-9 legal and visual finalization decisions

- Backlog Item ID: BI-260007
- Title: Deliver phased legal rollout and modernized brand-preserving visual refresh
- Status: Ready
- Persona/Actor: Public user and legal/compliance stakeholder
- Value statement: For visitors and maintainers, deliver launch-ready legal coverage and a modern,
  trustworthy visual experience while retaining Crystord brand continuity.
- Context: Section 9 open questions are decided and must be operationalized before and after launch.
- Problem statement: Without explicit implementation follow-through, legal text and visual direction
  can drift or remain partially unresolved.
- Expected outcome: Launch publishes reviewed legal/support content and a modernized visual UI, with
  phase-2 legal rewrite tracked to completion.
- Success metric(s): Section-9 decisions are visible in released content and tracked in backlog.
- Acceptance criteria (behavior):
  - The new site's visual design is implemented according to the `branding.md` guidelines.
  - Legal pages (Privacy, Terms, Support) are visually refreshed but their text content is preserved exactly.
  - The final visual theme is applied consistently across all public pages.
  - The implementation must adhere to the visual guidelines and token system defined in `.github/project/branding.md`.
  - Reviewed legal/support pages are live at launch.
  - Phase-2 legal rewrite tasking is present and scheduled.
  - Visual implementation reflects modernized layout/typography/component design.
  - Brand anchors remain recognizable.
- Non-goals: A complete, pixel-perfect redesign; this is a refresh, not a full new brand identity.
- Constraints: The visual refresh must not break accessibility or readability standards.
- Dependencies: Legal copy review input and final design execution choices.
- Risks/assumptions: Delayed legal rewrite can leave phase-1 text in place longer than desired.
- Validation approach: Release checklist + content/design review against ADR-260007.
- Priority score: High
- Target window: Phase 1 before launch, Phase 2 immediately post-launch
- Links:
  - Requirement entry: REQ-FR-260007.md
  - ADR: ADR-260007.md
  - ICR: n/a
  - PR/changeset: n/a
